name: postman-newman-framework
description: Source Postman/Newman API test assets consumed by the Postman Decoupling Framework.

scripts.newman:local: newman run collections/placement-api.collection.json -e environments/local.postman_environment.json -d data/placement-test-data.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export reports/newman-local.json
scripts.newman:ci: newman run collections/placement-api.collection.json -e environments/ci.postman_environment.json -d data/placement-test-data.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export reports/newman-ci.json
